overview: EduTrack is a Student Performance Analysis and Reporting System with role-based access for Admins and Teachers. It supports Excel/CSV upload of student performance data with CO-wise attainment analysis, total mark calculation, and visualized reports.
features: Secure login with role-based access (Admin and Teacher)
Excel/CSV upload for student performance data
Total mark auto-calculation (Midsem + Quiz + Assignment + Attendance)
Student search by name, roll number, or class
Persistent data storage with authenticated access
